requirement_topic.en: EMC — Bare Induction Motor (no integrated electronics) — Chile SUBTEL / SEC
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——纯感应电机（无集成电子装置）——智利SUBTEL/SEC
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——純感應電機（無集成電子裝置）——智利SUBTEL/SEC

summary.en: In Chile, EMC regulation for radio and telecommunications interference falls under SUBTEL (Subsecretaría de Telecomunicaciones). A bare mains-fed induction motor with no integrated electronic control or radio transmitter/receiver is generally not subject to SUBTEL radio-interference type approval. SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles) oversees electrical product safety and market access; SEC product registration covers safety and performance, not standalone EMC certification for passive motors. INN adopts IEC standards (including IEC 60034 series) as NCh norms; EMC requirements for rotating machines reference NCh/IEC 60034-1 and related norms. There is no Chilean equivalent of EU EMC Directive mandatory CE marking for a bare induction motor.
summary.zh: 在智利，无线电和通信干扰的EMC法规由SUBTEL（电信次秘书处）管理。无集成电子控制器或无线电收发器的纯工频感应电机，一般不须经SUBTEL无线电干扰型式批准。SEC（电力和燃料监察局）监管电气产品安全和市场准入；SEC产品注册涵盖安全和性能，不包括被动电机的独立EMC认证。INN将IEC标准（包括IEC 60034系列）采纳为NCh规范；旋转电机的EMC要求引用NCh/IEC 60034-1及相关规范。智利对纯感应电机没有与欧盟EMC指令CE标志等效的强制要求。
summary.zht: 在智利，無線電和通信干擾的EMC法規由SUBTEL（電信次秘書處）管理。無集成電子控制器或無線電收發器的純工頻感應電機，一般不須經SUBTEL無線電干擾型式批准。SEC（電力和燃料監察局）監管電氣產品安全和市場准入；SEC產品注冊涵蓋安全和性能，不包括被動電機的獨立EMC認證。INN將IEC標準（包括IEC 60034系列）採納為NCh規範；旋轉電機的EMC要求引用NCh/IEC 60034-1及相關規範。智利對純感應電機沒有與歐盟EMC指令CE標誌等效的強制要求。

standards_or_laws: NCh/IEC 60034-1 (rotating machines rating and performance, INN adoption)
SUBTEL — Ley 18.168 General de Telecomunicaciones (radio interference scope)

summary.en: China does not impose a dedicated mandatory EMC standard on bare passive induction motors. For variable-speed drive systems, GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equivalent to IEC 61800-3:2004) governs EMC for adjustable-speed power drive systems as a recommended (GB/T) standard, not mandatory. CCC certification does not specifically require EMC testing for general industrial induction motors unless the product is listed in the CCC compulsory catalogue for EMC.
summary.zh: 中国对纯被动感应电机没有专门的强制性EMC标准。对于变速驱动系统，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）作为推荐性国家标准规定了变速电力传动系统的EMC要求，非强制。除非产品列入CCC强制认证EMC目录，否则CCC认证通常不要求对通用工业感应电机进行EMC测试。
summary.zht: 中國對純被動感應電機沒有專門的強制性EMC標準。對於變速驅動系統，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004）作為推薦性國家標準規定了變速電力傳動系統的EMC要求，非強制。除非產品列入CCC強制認證EMC目錄，否則CCC認證通常不要求對通用工業感應電機進行EMC測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equiv. IEC 61800-3:2004) — variable speed drive EMC, recommended standard only
CCC (not generally applicable for bare motor EMC)

gap.en: For a bare passive induction motor, neither Chile nor China imposes a standalone mandatory EMC certification step — the gap is minimal for this product configuration. Chile's SUBTEL scope does not typically extend to bare induction motors without radio or electronic components. SEC product registration covers electrical safety, not EMC in isolation. If the motor is integrated with a VFD or inverter, additional EMC considerations may apply — verify with SUBTEL and SEC for drive-integrated systems.
gap.zh: 对于纯被动感应电机，智利和中国均不要求独立的强制EMC认证步骤——此产品配置的差距极小。SUBTEL管辖范围通常不延伸至无无线电或电子元件的纯感应电机。SEC产品注册涵盖电气安全，不单独涵盖EMC。若电机与变频器集成，可能需要额外的EMC考量——集成驱动系统须向SUBTEL和SEC核实。
gap.zht: 對於純被動感應電機，智利和中國均不要求獨立的強制EMC認證步驟——此產品配置的差距極小。SUBTEL管轄範圍通常不延伸至無無線電或電子元件的純感應電機。SEC產品注冊涵蓋電氣安全，不單獨涵蓋EMC。若電機與變頻器集成，可能需要額外的EMC考量——集成驅動系統須向SUBTEL和SEC核實。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory for bare passive induction motors in Chile; SUBTEL EMC scope applies to products with radio/electronic components; SEC covers safety and market registration
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for bare induction motors; GB/T 12668.3 is recommended only for drive systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For a bare induction motor without integrated electronics, Chile does not impose a standalone mandatory EMC certification equivalent to EU CE EMC marking. The primary Chilean market-access obligation remains SEC mandatory stamp and product registration. If the motor includes electronic controls, inverter, or radio components, SUBTEL approval may apply — verify product scope with SUBTEL. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于无集成电子装置的纯感应电机，智利不要求与欧盟CE EMC标志等效的独立强制EMC认证。智利主要市场准入义务仍为SEC强制认证章和产品注册。若电机包含电子控制器、逆变器或无线电组件，可能适用SUBTEL批准——须向SUBTEL核实产品范围。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於無集成電子裝置的純感應電機，智利不要求與歐盟CE EMC標誌等效的獨立強制EMC認證。智利主要市場准入義務仍為SEC強制認證章和產品注冊。若電機包含電子控制器、逆變器或無線電組件，可能適用SUBTEL批准——須向SUBTEL核實產品範圍。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Motor with Integrated VFD / Drive System — Chile
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——集成变频器的电机/驱动系统——智利
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——集成變頻器的電機/驅動系統——智利

summary.en: When a motor is combined with a variable-frequency drive (VFD), inverter, or other power electronics, the combined system may fall within SUBTEL's EMC scope if it generates radio-frequency interference. SUBTEL administers EMC/radio interference requirements under Ley 18.168. SEC may also require product registration for the combined drive system. INN adopts IEC 61800-3 as NCh/IEC 61800-3 for adjustable-speed power drive systems EMC. Manufacturers should confirm with SUBTEL whether their VFD-integrated motor system requires type-approval or homologation for EMC in Chile before market entry.
summary.zh: 当电机与变频器（VFD）、逆变器或其他电力电子装置组合时，若产生射频干扰，该组合系统可能属于SUBTEL的EMC管辖范围。SUBTEL依据《第18.168号电信总法》管理EMC/无线电干扰要求。SEC也可能要求对组合驱动系统进行产品注册。INN将IEC 61800-3采纳为NCh/IEC 61800-3，用于变速电力传动系统EMC。制造商在进入市场前应向SUBTEL确认其变频器集成电机系统是否需要在智利进行型式批准或认证。
summary.zht: 當電機與變頻器（VFD）、逆變器或其他電力電子裝置組合時，若產生射頻干擾，該組合系統可能屬於SUBTEL的EMC管轄範圍。SUBTEL依據《第18.168號電信總法》管理EMC/無線電干擾要求。SEC也可能要求對組合驅動系統進行產品注冊。INN將IEC 61800-3採納為NCh/IEC 61800-3，用於變速電力傳動系統EMC。製造商在進入市場前應向SUBTEL確認其變頻器集成電機系統是否需要在智利進行型式批准或認證。

standards_or_laws: NCh/IEC 61800-3 (adjustable speed power drive systems EMC, INN adoption)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equivalent to IEC 61800-3:2004, two editions behind IEC 61800-3:2022) as a recommended standard for EMC of adjustable-speed power drive systems. It is not mandatory for most industrial drive products unless specifically listed in the CCC catalogue. Manufacturers test voluntarily to GB/T 12668.3 for quality assurance but no mandatory regulatory EMC filing is required for most industrial motor-drive products in China.
summary.zh: 中国使用GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004，落后IEC 61800-3:2022两个版本）作为变速电力传动系统EMC的推荐性标准。除非明确列入CCC目录，否则大多数工业驱动产品不强制执行。制造商自愿按GB/T 12668.3测试以保证质量，但中国大多数工业电机驱动产品无须强制性监管EMC备案。
summary.zht: 中國使用GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同IEC 61800-3:2004，落後IEC 61800-3:2022兩個版本）作為變速電力傳動系統EMC的推薦性標準。除非明確列入CCC目錄，否則大多數工業驅動產品不強制執行。製造商自願按GB/T 12668.3測試以保證質量，但中國大多數工業電機驅動產品無須強制性監管EMC備案。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equiv. IEC 61800-3:2004) — recommended standard, not mandatory for most configurations

gap.en: For motor+VFD integrated systems, Chile's SUBTEL may require EMC homologation if radio-frequency interference is generated; NCh/IEC 61800-3 is the relevant reference standard. China's GB/T 12668.3-2012 is based on IEC 61800-3:2004 (older edition) and is a recommended, not mandatory, standard. Exporters must determine whether their specific drive-integrated motor system triggers SUBTEL homologation requirements before Chilean market entry. SEC product registration for the combined system may also be required.
gap.zh: 对于电机+变频器集成系统，若产生射频干扰，智利SUBTEL可能要求EMC认证；NCh/IEC 61800-3是相关参考标准。中国GB/T 12668.3-2012基于IEC 61800-3:2004（旧版本），为推荐性标准而非强制性标准。出口商在进入智利市场前须确认其具体的变频器集成电机系统是否触发SUBTEL认证要求。组合系统的SEC产品注册也可能是必需的。
gap.zht: 對於電機+變頻器集成系統，若產生射頻干擾，智利SUBTEL可能要求EMC認證；NCh/IEC 61800-3是相關參考標準。中國GB/T 12668.3-2012基於IEC 61800-3:2004（舊版本），為推薦性標準而非強制性標準。出口商在進入智利市場前須確認其具體的變頻器集成電機系統是否觸發SUBTEL認證要求。組合系統的SEC產品注冊也可能是必需的。

mandatory_status.target: SUBTEL homologation may be mandatory for VFD-integrated motor systems generating radio-frequency interference — verify product scope with SUBTEL before export; SEC registration required for combined system
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) only — GB/T 12668.3 compliance is voluntary; CCC not mandatory for most industrial drive configurations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For a motor+VFD system exported to Chile, SUBTEL homologation may be required if the system generates radio-frequency interference. NCh/IEC 61800-3 is the relevant technical reference. SEC registration for the combined system is also likely required. China's GB/T 12668.3-2012 (recommended standard only) does not automatically satisfy Chilean regulatory requirements. Verify SUBTEL and SEC scope with qualified local counsel before export. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口至智利的电机+变频器系统，若产生射频干扰，可能需要SUBTEL认证。NCh/IEC 61800-3是相关技术参考标准。组合系统的SEC注册可能也是必要的。中国GB/T 12668.3-2012（仅为推荐性标准）不能自动满足智利监管要求。出口前须向当地合格专业人士核实SUBTEL和SEC管辖范围。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口至智利的電機+變頻器系統，若產生射頻干擾，可能需要SUBTEL認證。NCh/IEC 61800-3是相關技術參考標準。組合系統的SEC注冊可能也是必要的。中國GB/T 12668.3-2012（僅為推薦性標準）不能自動滿足智利監管要求。出口前須向當地合格專業人士核實SUBTEL和SEC管轄範圍。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
